name: Parque Natural de la Serra d'Irta — Circular desde Alcossebre
region_intro: Mountain biking around Alcalà De Xivert offers diverse landscapes where mountains meet the Mediterranean Sea. The region is characterized by the rugged terrain of the Sierra de Irta Natural Park, featuring mountainous areas, Mediterranean forests, and dramatic cliffs that descend to secluded coves. This unique environment provides a variety of mountain bike trails, ranging from coastal paths with sea views to ascents through hills and scrubland. Best mountain bike trails around Alcalà De Xivert The most popular mountain bike trail is Parque Natural de la Serra d'Irta — Circular desde Alcossebre, a 16.1 miles (25.9 km) trail that takes 2 hours 53 minutes to complete. This moderate circular route offers significant elevation changes within the natural park. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Cami del Pla del Pebret – Camí del Pebret Coastal Trail loop from Antiga estació d'Alcossebre, a moderate 24.2 miles (39.0 km) path. This route follows a spectacular dirt road next to the sea, providing impressive coastal views. Local mountain bikers also love the Hermitage of Saint Anthony – Torrenostra coastal area loop from Alcossebre, a 27.5 miles (44.2 km) trail leading through coastal areas, often completed in about 2 hours 19 minutes. Mountain biking around Alcalà De Xivert is defined by coastal paths, Mediterranean forests, and the rugged terrain of the Sierra de Irta Natural Park. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easier coastal rides to more challenging mountain ascents. The routes in Alcalà De Xivert are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 500 reviews. More than 2,000 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Alcalà De Xivert's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: Alcalà De Xivert offers nearly 100 mountain bike trails, catering to various skill levels. You'll find a good mix of easy, moderate, and difficult routes to explore the region's diverse landscapes.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: The terrain in Alcalà De Xivert is incredibly varied, ranging from coastal paths with stunning sea views to ascents through Mediterranean forests and the rugged, mountainous landscape of the Sierra de Irta Natural Park. Many routes feature stony paths, making mountain bikes highly recommended.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: Yes, Alcalà De Xivert has 21 easy mountain bike trails. These routes are generally less demanding, offering a gentle introduction to mountain biking while still allowing you to enjoy the beautiful coastal scenery or the lower slopes of the Sierra de Irta.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: Yes, many routes in the area are circular. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e930633433/parque-natural-de-la-serra-d-irta-circular-desde-alcossebre" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Parque Natural de la Serra d'Irta — Circular desde Alcossebre&lt;/a&gt; is a popular moderate route that takes you through the natural park. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38257773" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cami del Pla del Pebret – Camí del Pebret Coastal Trail loop from Antiga estació d'Alcossebre&lt;/a&gt;, which offers impressive coastal views.

Q: What historical landmarks can I see along the mountain bike trails?
A: Many routes incorporate historical sites. You can cycle towards the impressive &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/244763" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Castillo de Xivert&lt;/a&gt;, a restored Muslim fortress with panoramic views. The Santa Lucía y San Benito Chapel, perched on Monte de San Benito, also offers exceptional views and is accessible via cycling trails.

Q: Are there any viewpoints or scenic spots along the mountain bike routes?
A: Absolutely. The region is known for its spectacular views where mountains meet the sea. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5345824" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;L'Ametler Forest Observatory&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/664484" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Summit of les Campanilles&lt;/a&gt; are excellent spots for panoramic vistas. Coastal routes, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/3969957" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Hermitage of Saint Anthony – Torrenostra coastal area loop from Alcossebre&lt;/a&gt;, also provide stunning sea views.

Q: What natural features can I explore while mountain biking in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: The Sierra de Irta Natural Park is a highlight, offering dense vegetation, diverse wildlife, and a rugged coastline with steep cliffs and beautiful hidden coves like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5508453" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ribamar Cove&lt;/a&gt;. You can also visit the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1657526" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Prat de Cabanes-Torreblanca Natural Park&lt;/a&gt;, an important wetland a few kilometers away.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: The mountain bike routes in Alcalà De Xivert are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 500 reviews. More than 2,000 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore the varied terrain, often praising the unique combination of coastal and mountainous landscapes.

Q: Are there any challenging mountain bike trails for experienced riders?
A: Yes, for experienced riders, there are 23 difficult trails. These routes often involve significant elevation changes and technical sections, particularly within the mountainous areas of the Sierra de Irta Natural Park. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/992059" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Torre Badum and Cala Argilaga – Coastal path loop from Antiga estació d'Alcossebre&lt;/a&gt;, which covers over 55 km with considerable elevation gain.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: Alcalà De Xivert enjoys a Mediterranean climate with mild winters and hot summers, making it suitable for mountain biking year-round. Spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant temperatures for longer rides, while cooler mornings are ideal during the summer months.

Q: Are there any routes that combine coastal views with mountain ascents?
A: Many routes in Alcalà De Xivert offer this unique combination. The region's geography, where mountains meet the sea, allows for trails that transition from scenic coastal paths to ascents through Mediterranean forests and hills, providing diverse riding experiences and breathtaking views.

Q: What is the longest mountain bike route available in Alcalà De Xivert?
A: One of the longer routes is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/992059" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Torre Badum and Cala Argilaga – Coastal path loop from Antiga estació d'Alcossebre&lt;/a&gt;, which spans approximately 55.1 kilometers. This moderate trail offers a substantial ride with varied terrain and coastal scenery.
